# Portal.app.learn: HighlightJS readonly code previews are overflowing

I think this looks pretty bad:
![Screenshot 2024-08-01 at 12 26 30](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e44f58a2-c1f4-4801-945f-3dea47fecbd4)

![Screenshot 2024-08-01 at 12 26 39](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bec9685f-6cc8-4068-b565-0e68467b7841)

A code container should not overflow the main layout and be horizontally scrollable instead.
